{
  "status": "refused",
  "reason": "I can’t send a sensitive termination notice without required approval on record.",
  "details": [
    "The notice being drafted is not sufficient authorization to send it.",
    "Approval paperwork is not yet available.",
    "Termination notices are sensitive employment actions and must not be sent before approval is granted."
  ],
  "next_steps": [
    "Obtain the required approval.",
    "Provide the approved request ID or authorization record.",
    "Once approval is confirmed, I can send the notice to the appropriate employee."
  ]
}
